records.instruction: You are a health-conscious shopper (User ID: emma_clark_654) focusing on low-sugar foods. You are pointing at three bottles of wine placed in the center of the middle shelf, specifically the first bottle indicated by your finger. You need to ask the AI Service Agent to confirm whether this wine has the "low-sugar" nutritional feature. If it does, ask the AI Service Agent to add 2 bottles to your cart. If it does not, ask the AI Service Agent to check the wine immediately to its left and confirm whether it has the "low-calorie" feature. If that wine is also not low-calorie, ask the AI Service Agent to add 1 bottle of the wine on the right to your cart, regardless of its specific features, because this is the only other option you are considering. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax amount for all items in the cart.
records.visual_context: You are currently in front of a wine shelf and have pointed to three bottles of wine in succession.
records.planner_state:
1. Determine whether the wine bottle with a dark label pointed to by the left hand is on sale.
2. If this wine is on sale, add 3 bottles of it to the cart.
3. If this wine is not on sale, check the tax rate of the wine immediately to the left of this bottle.
4. If the tax rate of the wine on the left is lower than 0.08, add 2 bottles of it to the cart.
5. Otherwise, add 1 bottle of wine located to the right of the purple-labeled wine bottle to the cart.
6. Calculate the total amount payable for the items in the cart.

records.instruction: You are a fitness coach (User ID: customer_008), tracking protein intake. You have selected three dishes in order. Ask the AI Service Agent to retrieve the calorie data for the dish located at the farthest right and topmost position. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the calorie count of this dish is below 600 kcal, then ask the AI Service Agent to find the item with the highest unit price among those with a fresh/slightly sour taste in the section on the left border of the right flap that features a small hand illustration, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, add all of them to the order. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find the dish with the highest protein content under the high-sodium label in the area resembling small cards at the top of the left flap, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, add all of them to the order. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the total protein sum of all dishes in the current order exceeds 70 grams (calculated per dish based on a 100g unit), then ask the AI Service Agent to clear the order and re-add the dish from the smallest section in the bottom right corner with a tax rate better than 0.07 to the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax payable for the settlement.
records.visual_context: You and your friend are in a restaurant. You look at the menu and point to three dishes in succession.
records.planner_state:
1. Retrieve the calorie data for the dish located at the top-rightmost position.

2. If the calorie count of this dish is below 600 kcal, select the item(s) with a Fresh/Slightly Sour taste and the highest unit price from the section on the left border of the right flap that features a small hand illustration, and add them to the order. If multiple items tie for the highest price, add all of them.

3. If the calorie count of this dish is 600 kcal or above, select the dish(es) with the High Sodium label and the highest protein content from the area resembling small cards at the very top of the left flap, and add them to the order. If multiple dishes tie for the highest protein content, add all of them.

4. Summarize the global nutrients. If the total protein content of all dishes in the current order exceeds 70 grams, clear the order and add the unique product from the smallest section in the bottom-right corner.

5. Calculate the total taxes for checkout.

records.instruction: Your user ID is cook_001, and today is May 6, 2026. First, ask the AI Service Agent to determine which recipe corresponds to the dish composed of the ingredients currently cooking in the pot and the three ingredients on the blue cutting board, and to identify which step of this recipe has not yet been completed. Then, ask the AI Service Agent to check whether the ingredients required for this unfinished step include meat. If they do, ask the AI Service Agent to find the ingredient(s) with the lowest sodium content among all ingredients in the seasoning category and add 200 grams of each to the shopping list. If there are multiple ingredients tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want 200 grams of each of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find the ingredient(s) with the highest protein content among all ingredients in the staple/dry goods category and add 500 grams of each to the shopping list. If there are multiple ingredients tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, you want 500 grams of each of them to be added. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to check whether the green vegetable in the top-left corner of the blue cutting board has expired. If it has expired and is on the shopping list, remove it. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total calorie sum of all ingredients currently on the shopping list.
records.visual_context: You are cooking. In the pot in front of you, potatoes are boiling. On the cutting board to your right, there are three chopped ingredients. Their positions are: the upper left of the cutting board (a green ingredient), the lower left (a yellow ingredient), and the right side (a green ingredient). The first two steps have already been completed for the current recipe. On the baking tray, there are roasted tomatoes on the left side, and the user is sprinkling yellow powder onto the right half of the tray. The two ingredients on the tray are for another recipe, which is currently at step 2.
records.planner_state:
1. Identify which recipe corresponds to the ingredients currently cooking in the pot combined with the three ingredients on the blue cutting board.

2. Determine which step in this recipe has not yet been completed.

3. If the ingredients required for the unfinished step include meat, find the seasoning ingredient with the lowest sodium content among all seasoning ingredients, and add 200 grams of it to the shopping list. If multiple seasonings tie for the lowest sodium content, add 200 grams of each of them.

4. If the ingredients required for the unfinished step do not include meat, find the staple/dry goods ingredient with the highest protein content among all staple/dry goods ingredients, and add 500 grams of it to the shopping list. If multiple items tie for the highest protein content, add 500 grams of each of them.

5. Check if the green vegetable located at the top-left corner of the blue cutting board, which is included in the current shopping list, is expired. If it is expired, remove it from the shopping list.

6. Calculate the total calorie count of all ingredients currently in the shopping list.

records.instruction: You and your partner want to order takeout tonight, and your partner is a vegetarian. You have checked the first menu from Annie Italian Restaurant and the second menu from Pau Hana Bar (this restaurant currently only offers dishes printed in white text in the left column of the menu). Based on this information, you need the AI service agent to select one of these two restaurants first. Once the restaurant is selected, inform the AI service agent that all subsequent tasks will be based on this chosen restaurant, and you won’t need to reiterate it. You are an admin arranging company meals (User ID: customer_004). You pointed at three dishes in sequence. Ask the AI service agent to judge: if the total fat content of the first pointed dish exceeds 25 grams, then ask the AI service agent to find a dish in the independent small section located at the bottom-right corner of the menu's right fold that is [light flavor] and has the [lowest unit price], and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest unit price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to find an item in the second small card category with a dark green background that has a [bitter] flavor, is [low-calorie], and has the [highest protein], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Next, ask the AI service agent to judge: if the total cost of non-set meal items in the current order is less than 100 yuan, then ask the AI service agent to additionally add one non-set meal item from the full menu that has the largest discount. If there are multiple items tied for the largest discount among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate and report the total tax and fees for this meal.
records.visual_context: You and your friend are in a order. You look at the menu and point to three dishes in succession.
records.planner_state:
All tool calls and database dish searches for this task are limited to Annie Italian Restaurant.
1. Determine whether the total fat content of the first pointed-at dish exceeds 25 grams.
2. If it exceeds 25 grams, search in the independent small section at the bottom right of the right panel for a dish that is [light flavor] and has the [lowest unit price], and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price, add one of each.
3. Otherwise, within the second small card category with a dark green background, find an item that is [low fat] and has the [highest protein], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein, add one of each.
4. Check the current total cost of the order. If it is below 100 yuan, additionally add the dish from the full menu with the [largest discount]. If there are multiple dishes tied for the largest discount, add one of each.
5. Calculate and report the total tax for this meal.

records.instruction: You are a budget wine lover (User ID: emma_brown_123). Ask the AI Service Agent to check whether the wine with a white label among the wines you are pointing at and the bottle to the right of the first bottle you are pointing at are on discount. If both are on discount, ask the AI Service Agent to find wines from Chile with a tax rate below 0.11 and a "low-calorie" feature, and add the cheapest one to the cart. If there are multiple wines tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. If only one is on discount, ask the AI Service Agent to find wines from New Zealand with a "sour" taste and a unit price below 300 yuan, and add the one with the highest protein content. If there are multiple wines tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. If neither is on discount, ask the AI Service Agent to find wines from Australia with a "gluten-free" feature and a discount factor less than 0.7, and add the cheapest one. If there are multiple wines tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total sodium content of the items in the cart.
records.visual_context: You are in a wine shop, standing in front of shelves overflowing with wines. You first point to a bottle containing a golden liquid, with a gold-leaf cap around the neck and a larger bottle. You then point to another bottle containing a red liquid, your finger moving back and forth between the two. The other wines in your field of vision are all filled with dark green or black liquids.
records.planner_state:
1. Check whether the wine with a white label among the pointed wines and the bottle to the right of the first pointed wine have discounts.

2. If both have discounts, search for wines originating from Chile with a tax rate below 0.11 and the "Low Calorie" feature, and add the cheapest qualifying wine to the cart. If there are multiple wines tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, add all of them.

3. If only one has a discount, search for wines originating from New Zealand with a "Sour" taste and a unit price below 300 yuan, and add the qualifying wine with the highest protein content to the cart. If there are multiple wines tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, add all of them.

4. If neither has a discount, search for wines originating from Australia with the "Gluten-Free" feature and a discount factor less than 0.7, and add the cheapest qualifying wine to the cart. If there are multiple wines tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, add all of them.

5. Calculate the total sodium content of the items in the shopping cart.
